title: Characterization of the A4 cytoplasmic male-sterile lines of sorghum using RFLP of mtDNA
abstract:
Three sorghum cytoplasmic male sterile lines CSV4 A(V), CSV4 A(G1) and CSV4 A(M), grouped as A4, were
compared with amilo (A1) and two other non-milo (A2 andA3) cytoplasms for their RFLP patterns ofmitochondrial
DNA (mtDNA). A 9.7 kb clone from pearl millet mtDNA discriminated each of the three A4 entries whereas other
maize and pearl millet mtDNA clones used could not distinguish this group completely. The molecular differences
within the A4 cytoplasmic group offer some explanation for the inconsistency in the fertility restoration behaviour
of these A4 lines obtained with a definite set of testers in the field.
